name: chart-bar-label-custom
visual_summary: A customizable bar chart component for visualizing categorical data. Developers use it to create interactive and informative dashboards. Customize the label styles and colors to fit the theme.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-label-custom
Description: A customizable bar chart component for visualizing categorical data. Developers use it to create interactive and informative dashboards. Customize the label styles and colors to fit the theme.
Style: e.g. dark, material, modern
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: chart, bar-chart, dashboard, data-visualization, customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
